TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_kinaizuanan_nua_kakukakudan_nua_sekacalisian, title = kinaizuanan_nua_kakukakudan_nua_sekacalisian, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/kinaizuanan_nua_kakukakudan_nua_sekacalisian} }

S.FORM: namakeljang a kakikangavangan i tayuan mavan aicu a kinaizuanan nua kakukakudan nua sekacalisian a pasamaza i qabizay nua i lamtawking. a pasa tua gadu aicu a kakivangavangan a sipapukeljang tia kakukakudan nua matjaliaw a kazukuan nua sekacalisian nua i tayuan tua zuma a namangetjez a semamaza. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: namakəʎaŋ a kakikaŋavaŋan i tajuan mavan aiʦu a kinaizuanan nua kakukakudan nua səkaʦaɭisian a pasamaza i qabizaj nua i ɭamtawkiŋ. a pasa tua gadu aiʦu a kakivaŋavaŋan a sipapukəʎaŋ tia kakukakudan nua maʦaɭiaw a kazukuan nua səkaʦaɭisian nua i tajuan tua zuma a namaŋəʦəz a səmamaza. == kasizuanan ==
S.FORM: namakeljang a kakikangavangan i tayuan mavan aicu a kinaizuanan nua kakukakudan nua sekacalisian a pasamaza i qabizay nua i lamtawking. a pasa tua gadu aicu a kakivangavangan a sipapukeljang tia kakukakudan nua matjaliaw a kazukuan nua sekacalisian nua i tayuan tua zuma a namangetjez a semamaza. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: namakəʎaŋ a kakikaŋavaŋan i tajuan mavan aiʦu a kinaizuanan nua kakukakudan nua səkaʦaɭisian a pasamaza i qabizaj nua i ɭamtawkiŋ. a pasa tua gadu aiʦu a kakivaŋavaŋan a sipapukəʎaŋ tia kakukakudan nua maʦaɭiaw a kazukuan nua səkaʦaɭisian nua i tajuan tua zuma a namaŋəʦəz a səmamaza. == kasizuanan ==
